/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/simpler_plugingui.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmuse_simpler_plugingui.so -o libmuse_simpler_plugingui.so CMakeFiles/simpler_plugingui.dir/simpler_plugingui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simpler_plugingui.dir/moc_simpler_plugingui.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a libmuse_simpler_plugin.so ../../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_cache_reader_module.so ../../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_list_module.so ../../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_scan_module.so ../../libs/xml/libmuse_xml_module.so /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libQt5Xml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19 -ldl
